sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97516" key="sugge/rwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγγέρων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n97516.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">co-mate in old age</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:22:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
